title: Elaphoglossum macropodium
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum macropodium is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family includes a large number of genera, many of which are still being studied and classified. As a member of the Dryopteridaceae family, Elaphoglossum macropodium is part of the larger group known as the polypod ferns. The classification of Elaphoglossum macropodium also places it within the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. Understanding the complex relationships between fern species and their classification can be a challenging but rewarding area of study.
